name: aacr2026_schema_a_master — root shape
what_it_solves: Root shape of the AACR 2026 Schema A master JSON (top-level keys, list lengths, first-item keys).
how_it_solves: Structural summarisation only — the file is ~4 MB and raw payload not carried at root (see per-key entities below).
why_it_exists: Avoids blowing the KB up while still making the schema addressable.

top_summary.note: AACR schema is not a dict at root
